title: gonolobus cinctus
intro: Gonolobus cinctus, also known as the "yellow striped coral root," is a perennial flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Gonolobus cinctus include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Gonolobus cinctus is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and its root is also dried and used in herbal remedies, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
